# Fixture Constitution

A minimal constitution used by primitive tests. The anchors below are
the resolution targets for the `resolve-anchor` primitive.

<!-- §spec-phase -->

## Spec Phase

A placeholder section that owns the `spec-phase` anchor.

<!-- §runtime-boundary -->

## Runtime Boundary

A placeholder section that owns the `runtime-boundary` anchor. Specs
elsewhere may reference §runtime-boundary or §spec-phase; both should
resolve. References to §unknown-anchor should be reported as
unresolved.
